title: Senior Doctor - Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Ghaziabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises:
Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises!
